utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (with costs), additional_services (with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). Thus, out of 7 total items, 5 are fully specified with all required details (destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, total_budget). Activities and additional_services miss cost details, so they are not fully specified.
